title: Wired wearable audio video to wireless audio video bridging device
abstract: An adapter or bridging device that provides both a wired audio or audio and video female jack connectors for wired devices such as wired earphones, headphones and wired video headsets; as well as a wireless link to nearby handheld computerized devices such as mobile phones (e.g. smartphones). The device may be configured to be clipped to the user's clothing, as well as to interface with pairing control devices to easily form Bluetooth, WiFi, or other type wireless links. The device may also include at least one computer processor to manage the wireless link, control the attached wired headphones or video headsets, as well as perform compression and decompression functions as desired.
claims:
Claims 1. A wired earphone to wireless bridge device, comprising: an audio signal input and output consisting of at least one female audio jack interface; a wireless communication interface for communication supported by mobile phones; wherein said device further comprises a clip configured to enable said device to be clipped to clothing of a user of said device; wherein said wireless communication interface comprises any of a Bluetooth or WiFi transceiver; and wherein said device further comprises a processor configured to receive audio compressed with a first compression scheme, and fully decompresses this received audio according to a first decompression scheme before sending this audio to said at least one female audio jack interface. 2. The device of claim 1, wherein said device is further configured to accept commands from an external control which allows wireless pairing of said device to said mobile phone to establish a wireless communication link. 3. The device of claim 1 , wherein said device further comprises an electronic display configured to receive information from the said mobile phone on the said display. 4. The device of claim 3, wherein said information comprises any of an SMS (Short Messaging System) message and an electronic mail (email) message. 5. The device in of claim 1, wherein said device further comprises a microphone, and said processor is configured to transmit verbal commands issued by the user to said mobile phone. 6. A wired-wearable 10- device -to-wireless bridge device, comprising: at least one wired video female jack interface configured to support any of video output and video input; a clip configured to enable said device to be clipped to clothing of a user of said device; and a wireless communication interface for communication supported by mobile phones; 

 wherein said wireless communication interface comprises any of a Bluetooth or WiFi transceiver; and wherein said device utilizes a processor configured to handle a video compression scheme on said wireless communication interface that is different than the video compression scheme on said wired video female jack interface. 7. The device of claim 6, wherein said device is further configured to accept commands from a pairing control which allows wireless pairing of said device with said mobile to establish a wireless communication link. 8. The device of claim 7, wherein said device is configured with at least one processor to support said pairing control. 9. The device of claim 6, wherein said device further comprises at least one audio jack interface, and wherein said at least one audio jack interface is any of a wired analog or digital audio female audio jack interface. 10. The device of claim 6, wherein said at least one wired video female j ack interface comprises an HDMI connector. 11. The device of claim 6, wherein said device is configured to convert video from an MPEG2 compression scheme to an MPEG4 compression scheme. 12. The device of claim 6, wherein said device is configured convert video according to a different compression scheme chosen to be less computationally intensive to decompress. 13. The device of claim 6, wherein said device is configured to convert video according to a different compression scheme that leads to a higher degree of video compression. 14. A wired earphone to wireless bridge device, comprising: at least one female audio jack interface; a wireless communication interface for communication supported by mobile phones; wherein said device is configured to support an external control that allows wireless pairing of said device to said mobile phone to establish a wireless communication link. 15. The device of claim 14, wherein said device further comprises a clip configured to enable said device to be clipped to clothing of a user of said device. 16. The device of claim 14, wherein said wireless communication interface comprises any of a Bluetooth or WiFi transceiver. 17. A wired earphone to wireless bridge device, comprising: at least one female audio jack interface; a wireless communication interface for communication supported by mobile phones; wherein said device further comprises a clip configured to enable said device to be clipped to clothing of a user of said device. 18. The device of claim 17, wherein said device is further configured to accept commands from an external control which allows wireless pairing of said device to said mobile phone to establish a wireless communication link. 19. The device of claim 17, wherein said wireless communication interface comprises any of a Bluetooth or WiFi transceiver. 20. A wired-wearable 10- device -to-wireless bridge device, comprising: at least one wired video female jack interface; and a wireless communication interface for communication supported by a mobile computerized device. 21. The device of claim 20, wherein said device further comprises a clip configured to enable said device to be clipped to clothing of a user of said device. 22. The device of claim 20, wherein said device is further configured to accept commands from an pairing control which allows wireless pairing of said device with a mobile phone to establish a wireless communication link. 23. The device of claim 20, wherein said device is configured with at least one processor to support a pairing operation with a mobile phone or other transceiver equipped mobile computerized device. 24. The device of claim 20, wherein said wireless communication interface comprises any of a Bluetooth or WiFi transceiver. 25. The device of claim 20, wherein said device further comprises at least one audio jack interface, and wherein said at least one audio jack interface is any of a wired analog or digital audio female audio jack interface. 26. The device of claim 20, wherein said device utilizes a different video compression scheme than the video compression scheme on said wired interface. 27. A wired earphone to wireless bridge device, comprising: an audio signal input and output consisting of at least one female audio jack interface; a wireless communication interface for communication supported by an internet connected voice recognition (Home) device; wherein said device further comprises a clip configured to enable said device to be clipped to clothing of a user of said device; wherein said wireless communication interface comprises any of a Bluetooth or WiFi transceiver; and wherein said device further comprises a processor configured to receive audio compressed with a first compression scheme, and fully decompresses this received audio according to a first decompression scheme before sending this audio to said at least one female audio jack interface. 28. The said device in Claim 27 , further comprises of an electronic display to receive information from said Home device on the said display. 29. The device of claim 28, wherein said information comprises any of an SMS (Short Messaging System) message and an electronic mail (email) message. 30. The device in of claim 27, wherein said device further comprises a microphone, and said processor is configured to transmit verbal commands issued by the user to a mobile phone.
